title: Crypto Little Changed as U.S. Launches Fresh Iran Strikes
dek: Bitcoin and ether were little changed as the U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran, reported as the third this week, alongside a reported closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The muted crypto reaction stands out against a live macro shock.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Bitcoin and ether were little changed despite the third reported U.S. strike on Iran this week and a reported Strait of Hormuz closure.
body: Bitcoin and ether were little changed as the United States launched fresh strikes on Iran, reported as the third this week.
Reporting also cited a closure of the Strait of Hormuz. Despite the escalation, the major crypto assets showed limited movement.
The muted reaction is itself notable context for a live macro event.
